title: FinancialTechWiz Pricing Explained: All Plans, Costs & Fees (2026)

excerpt: Complete breakdown of FinancialTechWiz pricing — all plans, hidden fees, and how to save money.
content:
FinancialTechWiz Pricing Overview

FinancialTechWiz is an AI-powered trading journal designed specifically for swing traders who want journal automation, broker integration, and personalized trade analysis without breaking the bank. The platform starts at $9.91/month on an annual plan, making it one of the most aggressively priced trading journals on the market.

Founded in 2024, FinancialTechWiz focuses on what matters to swing traders: eliminating manual entry through 25+ broker integrations, providing AI-driven insights on your patterns, and delivering daily coaching without the complexity of platforms that try to do everything. The platform is distributed through Whop, which affects checkout experience but aligns with their direct-to-trader model.

All FinancialTechWiz Plans Compared

FinancialTechWiz offers a straightforward two-tier pricing structure with no hidden complexity:

Plan Monthly Cost Annual Cost Savings vs Monthly
Standard (Monthly) $19/mo N/A —
Standard (Annual) $9.91/mo $119/year* 48% off

*Approximately $119/year based on $9.91/month pricing. Confirm exact annual amount at checkout.

All FinancialTechWiz plans include the same core feature set:

  • AI-Powered Analysis — Interactive AI coach reviews your trades and answers specific questions about patterns, risk, and performance.
  • Automated Broker Imports — Connect 25+ brokers (stocks, crypto) and automatically populate your journal with executed trades.
  • Daily Personalized Insights — Algorithm-generated daily summaries of your trading patterns, win rates, and improvement opportunities.
  • Custom Reports — Generate detailed P&L, win/loss ratios, and performance breakdowns by ticker or strategy.
  • Multi-Broker Support — Track activity across multiple accounts simultaneously without manual sync.
  • Cloud Sync — Access your journal from any device; trades sync in real time.
  • Community Access — Discord-based community with other swing traders (not built into the app).
  • Alerts — Custom alerts on trade performance and portfolio milestones.

There is no feature differentiation between monthly and annual plans—you get identical functionality. The only difference is payment frequency and the 48% discount for committing to a year.

Free Plan / Free Trial

FinancialTechWiz does not offer a permanent free tier. However, the platform provides a 7-day free trial that requires no credit card upfront—a significant advantage for traders hesitant to commit before testing.

The 7-day trial includes full access to all features, allowing you to:

  • Connect your broker and import live trades.
  • Experience the AI coach and daily insights firsthand.
  • Generate sample reports and test the interface.
  • Evaluate whether automated journaling fits your workflow.

Is the trial worth your time? Yes, especially if you're currently journaling manually or using a spreadsheet. The broker import and AI insights can save 10–15 hours per month for active swing traders. Use the trial to determine if the $9.91–$19/month cost is worth the automation and coaching value you'll receive.

Hidden Costs and Fees

FinancialTechWiz pricing is transparent—there are no hidden subscription add-ons, data feed charges, or surprise fees beyond the stated monthly or annual cost. However, there are a few practical considerations:

  • Whop Processing Fees — Whop (the payment processor) may charge a small processing fee depending on your payment method and region. This is typical for third-party payment platforms but is not FinancialTechWiz's direct charge.
  • Broker Fees Separate — Commission and slippage on your actual trades are charged by your broker, not FinancialTechWiz. The journal only tracks and analyzes these; it doesn't add fees.
  • No Options/Futures Support Clearly Stated — If you trade options, futures, or forex, support is not explicitly documented. You may need to contact support to confirm compatibility before subscribing.
  • Currency Conversion — If you're outside the US and pay in a non-USD currency, currency conversion rates may apply through your payment processor.

FinancialTechWiz Pricing vs Competitors

At $9.91/month annual, FinancialTechWiz is priced aggressively. Here's how it compares to established competitors:

Platform Monthly Price Annual Price Best For
FinancialTechWiz $19/mo $9.91/mo (≈$119/yr) Budget-conscious swing traders; AI-first analysis
Tradervue $20/mo–$100/mo $180–$990/yr Day traders; deep performance analytics; established platform
TradeZella $49/mo Free tier available Traders wanting premium analytics with free alternative
Spreadsheet Alternative $0/mo $0/yr Traders willing to build and maintain manually

Value Verdict:

  • vs. Tradervue: FinancialTechWiz is 3–8x cheaper annually ($119 vs $180–$990). Tradervue offers deeper analytics and a larger user base; FinancialTechWiz compensates with AI coaching and aggressive pricing. Winner for budget traders: FinancialTechWiz.
  • vs. TradeZella: TradeZella offers a free tier; FinancialTechWiz requires purchase but includes AI analysis that TradeZella doesn't. TradeZella is better for exploratory traders; FinancialTechWiz is better for committed swing traders who want AI-driven coaching.
  • vs. Manual Spreadsheet: A spreadsheet is free but costs 10–15 hours/month in setup and maintenance. FinancialTechWiz's $119/year ($10/mo) is a no-brainer for active traders—the automation alone pays for itself in time saved.

Is FinancialTechWiz Worth the Price?

TradingToolsHub Rating: 4.2/5

FinancialTechWiz delivers strong value for its target audience. Here's the honest breakdown:

Best For (Worth Every Penny):

  • Swing traders logging 5–30 trades/month — The 25+ broker integrations eliminate hours of manual entry. At $10/mo on annual, you break even on time savings in week one.
  • Traders struggling with consistency — The daily AI insights and coaching answer the "Why did that trade work?" question automatically, compressing learning curves.
  • Budget-conscious traders — At $9.91/mo annual, this is the lowest-priced AI-powered journal on the market. No sacrifices in core features.
  • Newer traders who need guidance — The AI coach is positioned as a teaching tool, not just a logging tool. Perfect for someone 3–6 months into trading who needs pattern feedback.

Cautions (Where FinancialTechWiz May Not Be Ideal):

  • Options, Futures, Forex Traders — Support is not explicitly documented. Confirm compatibility before subscribing if you trade derivatives.
  • Platform Longevity Concerns — Founded in 2024, FinancialTechWiz is newer than Tradervue (established 2011). If platform stability is your top concern, Tradervue has a longer track record.
  • Enterprise/Team Collaboration — The platform is designed for individual traders. No mention of multi-user accounts or team features.
  • Community Features — The community is Discord-based, not built into the journal. If you prefer in-app community engagement, this is a downside.

Annual vs. Monthly: The annual plan at $9.91/mo saves 48% vs. monthly at $19/mo. If you're uncertain, start with the 7-day trial. If you're committed to swing trading and want AI analysis, commit to annual and lock in the aggressive price.

How to Save on FinancialTechWiz

  • Pay Annually — The $9.91/mo annual plan is 48% cheaper than monthly at $19/mo. This is the single biggest discount available.
  • No Credit Card Trial — Use the 7-day free trial to ensure the platform fits your workflow before paying anything. This eliminates buyer's remorse.
  • Check for Whop Promotions — Since FinancialTechWiz is distributed through Whop, the platform may occasionally offer Whop coupon codes. Monitor the trading journals category page for promotions.
  • No Student or Bulk Discounts Listed — Currently, no student, educator, or volume discounts are advertised. Contact FinancialTechWiz directly if you qualify for special pricing.
  • Bundle Opportunities — If you use multiple tools (broker API, charting platform), check whether any offer FinancialTechWiz integration discounts or co-marketing offers.

Bottom Line: FinancialTechWiz's pricing is already competitive. The annual plan is your best deal—$9.91/month for a fully featured AI-powered trading journal is difficult to beat. The 7-day free trial carries zero friction, so test it before committing.

For detailed reviews and comparisons, see the TradingToolsHub trading journals comparison guide and FinancialTechWiz full review.
